root_goal: CTX를 context bootstrapper로 재포지셔닝 + 정직한 eval에서 G1 delta>=0.30, G2 R@5>=0.60
original_goal: G1/G2에 맞는 적절한 평가 방법 구축 + 수렴까지 개선

current_positioning.identity: Context bootstrapper for coding agents (not a search engine)
current_positioning.g1_value: Cross-session memory (unique — no other tool has this)
current_positioning.g2_value: <1ms pre-filter for agentic search (speeds up Claude Code first-turn)
current_positioning.differentiation: Only tool with persistent cross-session memory + <1ms deterministic + .md indexing
